series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of a list of questions that is sent to all Auditor of State Clients. These questions pertain to the Clients opinions and attitude about the Auditors Office and allows for comments and suggestions in improving the Auditors Office.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Maintain this transient record one (1) month they are compilated into a final report. Maintain final report five (5) years. ; Electronic: Maintain this transient record one (1) month they are compilated into a final report. Maintain final report five (5) years
